10: `npx` (Node Package Execute), bundled with npm (Node Package Manager) versions
11: 5.2.0 and later, is a utility that enables direct execution of Node.js packages from the
12: npm registry. This eliminates the need for global installation. In essence, `npx` serves
13: as an npm package runner, and it is commonly used to run many community MCP
14: servers, which are distributed as Node.js packages.
15: Creating an __init__.py file is necessary to ensure the agent.py file is recognized as
16: part of a discoverable Python package for the Agent Development Kit (ADK). This file
17: should reside in the same directory as agent.py.
